bird.name: Spiny-cheeked honeyeater
bird.summary: The spiny-cheeked honeyeater (Acanthagenys rufogularis) is the only species in the genus Acanthagenys. It is large for a honeyeater, rangin…

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: 塔斯馬尼亞州
locations.summary: 塔斯馬尼亞州（Tasmania，發音：/tæzˈmeɪniə/；帕拉瓦卡尼語：Lutruwita），簡稱塔州，是澳大利亞唯一的島嶼州，原名范迪門地（Van Diemen's Land，又譯萬迪門蘭）。該州位於澳大利亞大陸東南方約240公里…

locations.name: 大分水岭
locations.summary: 大分水岭（英語：Great Dividing Range），也称东部高地（Eastern Highlands），亦音譯作大狄維亭山脈，是澳大利亚大陆东部沿岸大致与海岸线平行的山脉、丘陵和高原的总称，北起约克角半岛，南至维多利亚州西部，长3…

locations.name: 袋鼠島
locations.summary: 袋鼠島（英語：Kangaroo Island），又译坎加鲁岛，是澳洲繼塔斯曼尼亞及梅爾維爾島之後的第三大島嶼，面積約4,405平方公里。袋鼠島位處聖文森特灣的入口，距離南澳州的首府阿德萊德西南112公里。島上距離大陸最近的位置離弗勒里厄半…

locations.name: 莫宁顿半岛
locations.summary: 莫宁顿半岛（英語：Mornington Peninsula）是位于澳大利亚东南部的维多利亚州中南海岸的一个半岛，是维多利亚最大海湾——菲利普港湾的东南和南部边界，并将其和维多利亚第二大湾——西港湾分离。半岛的法定东西侧地理起始点分别皮尔斯…

relations.subject: Spiny-cheeked honeyeater
relations.evidence: Accessed: 18 July 2007. The spiny-cheeked honeyeater is mainly frugivorous, but will also eat nectar, blossoms, insects, reptiles, and young birds. Its habitat includes deserts, coastal scrubland, and dry woodlands. It is also found in mangroves and orchards. Its range includes most of Australia, except for Tasmania, northern tropical areas, and the southeastern coast.[http://www.arthurgrosset.com/ozbirds/spiny-cheekedhoneyeater.html Oz Birds: Spiny-cheeked Honeyeater

relations.subject: Spiny-cheeked honeyeater

Its range includes most of Australia, except for Tasmania, northern tropical areas, and the southeastern coast.[http://www.arthurgrosset.com/ozbirds/spiny-cheekedhoneyeater.html Oz Birds: Spiny-cheeked Honeyeater

relations.subject: Spiny-cheeked honeyeater
relations.evidence: The spiny-cheeked honeyeater can be found in most locations throughout Australia, except east of the Great Dividing Range, Tasmania, the far south-west of Western Australia, and the northern Australian tropics. However, the birds do occur on Kangaroo Island in South Australia. Most sightings have been in sparse, woody tree environments

relations.subject: Spiny-cheeked honeyeater
relations.evidence: The spiny-cheeked honeyeater can be found in most locations throughout Australia, except east of the Great Dividing Range, Tasmania, the far south-west of Western Australia, and the northern Australian tropics. However, the birds do occur on Kangaroo Island in South Australia. Most sightings have been in sparse, woody tree environments

relations.subject: Spiny-cheeked honeyeater
relations.evidence: In these areas, there are occasional small shrubs or trees (mostly Acacia species), where the birds may find refuge. Other habitats include scattered woodland, open woodlands, sparse shrubland, and closed shrubland. The birds can also be found in managed and cultivated vegetated land and pasture lands, consisting of a range of grasses, including sedges, rushes, arrow grasses, and quillworts. In coastal regions, such as the Mornington Peninsula, the birds can be found in tea tree environments along the foreshore. The birds may occasionally be found in mangroves and orchards. They are considered a nomadic species; however, this seems to be more so in the northern parts of Australia

relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
